import React from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; export default function EarningsStatementsPage() { const statements = [ { id: 1, period: "January 2024", revenue: 12500000, payouts: 7800000, net: 4700000, status: "paid" }, { id: 2, period: "December 2023", revenue: 11800000, payouts: 7200000, net: 4600000, status: "paid" }, { id: 3, period: "November 2023", revenue: 11200000, payouts: 6800000, net: 4400000, status: "paid" } ]; return (
{/* Header */}
← Back to earnings

Earnings statements

View detailed monthly earnings statements

{/* Statements List */}
{statements.map((statement) => (

{statement.period}

Revenue: UGX {statement.revenue.toLocaleString()} Payouts: UGX {statement.payouts.toLocaleString()} Net: UGX {statement.net.toLocaleString()}
{statement.status}
))}
); }
